world_traits.name: Haze
world_traits.description: Thick atmospheric haze reduces visibility during combat operations.
world_traits.mechanical_effect: During battle, visibility is reduced to 1D6+8 inches

world_traits.name: Overgrown
world_traits.description: Dense vegetation covers much of the planet's surface.
world_traits.mechanical_effect: When setting up the table, add 1D6+2 individual plant features or 1D3 areas of vegetation (roughly 3-5 inches across)

world_traits.name: Warzone
world_traits.description: Recent or ongoing conflict has left the landscape scarred with destruction.
world_traits.mechanical_effect: When setting up the table, add 1D3 ruined buildings or craters

world_traits.name: Heavily Enforced
world_traits.description: Strong law enforcement keeps criminal activity suppressed.
world_traits.mechanical_effect: When fighting Criminal Elements opponents, the number encountered is reduced by 1. When rolling to see if they become Rivals, only roll a single die

world_traits.name: Rampant Crime
world_traits.description: Criminal organizations operate openly with little opposition.
world_traits.mechanical_effect: When fighting Criminal Elements opponents, add 1 to the number encountered

world_traits.name: Invasion Risk
world_traits.description: The world is vulnerable to external military threats.
world_traits.mechanical_effect: Add +1 to all Invasion rolls

world_traits.name: Imminent Invasion
world_traits.description: Enemy forces are massing at the borders, invasion is likely.
world_traits.mechanical_effect: Add +2 to all Invasion rolls. If the world is invaded, rolls for war progress are at -1

world_traits.name: Lacks Starship Facilities
world_traits.description: Limited infrastructure for starship maintenance and repair.
world_traits.mechanical_effect: You cannot spend more than 3 credits per campaign turn on starship Repairs

world_traits.name: Easy Recruiting
world_traits.description: Many skilled individuals seek employment opportunities.
world_traits.mechanical_effect: Add +1 to the roll when Recruiting

world_traits.name: Medical Science
world_traits.description: Advanced medical facilities provide excellent care at affordable rates.
world_traits.mechanical_effect: The cost for accelerated medical care is only 3 credits per character

world_traits.name: Technical Knowledge
world_traits.description: Local expertise and tools make repairs easier.
world_traits.mechanical_effect: Add +1 to all Repair attempts

world_traits.name: Opportunities
world_traits.description: Active job market with many potential employers.
world_traits.mechanical_effect: Add +1 to the roll when searching for Patrons

world_traits.name: Booming Economy
world_traits.description: Economic prosperity means more credits in circulation.
world_traits.mechanical_effect: When rolling for post-battle credit rewards, any 1 on the dice is rerolled until it shows a score other than 1

world_traits.name: Busy Markets
world_traits.description: Thriving trade centers offer diverse goods and services.
world_traits.mechanical_effect: Each campaign turn, you may spend 2 credits once to roll on the Trade Table

world_traits.name: Bureaucratic Mess
world_traits.description: Excessive red tape complicates even simple transactions.
world_traits.mechanical_effect: When attempting to leave, roll 2D6. On a 2-4, you are delayed and cannot leave this campaign turn without a bribe equal to the roll in credits. You may try again next campaign turn

world_traits.name: Restricted Education
world_traits.description: Training programs have strict approval requirements.
world_traits.mechanical_effect: You must roll 6+ to be approved for Advanced Training on this world

world_traits.name: Expensive Education
world_traits.description: Training programs charge premium rates.
world_traits.mechanical_effect: The fee to enroll in Advanced Training is 3 credits

world_traits.name: Travel Restricted
world_traits.description: Movement controls limit exploration activities.
world_traits.mechanical_effect: No more than one crew member may take the Explore option each campaign turn

world_traits.name: Unity Safe Sector
world_traits.description: Strong Unity military presence prevents invasions.
world_traits.mechanical_effect: The world cannot be Invaded

world_traits.name: Gloom
world_traits.description: Perpetual overcast or atmospheric conditions reduce visibility.
world_traits.mechanical_effect: In battle, maximum visibility is restricted to 1D6+6 inches

world_traits.name: Bot Manufacturing
world_traits.description: Local factories produce affordable robot components.
world_traits.mechanical_effect: All Bot upgrades are 1 credit cheaper

world_traits.name: Fuel Refinery
world_traits.description: Large-scale fuel production facilities reduce travel costs.
world_traits.mechanical_effect: Traveling from this world costs only 3 credits

world_traits.name: Alien Species Restricted
world_traits.description: Local laws prohibit certain species from full participation.
world_traits.mechanical_effect: Roll 1D10 to determine which species is restricted: 1=Engineer, 2-4=K'Erin, 5=Soulless, 6=Precursor, 7-9=Feral, 10=Swift. Characters of this type cannot be hired here (count as baseline Humans), and cannot undertake any crew jobs. They may participate in combat normally

world_traits.name: Weapon Licensing
world_traits.description: Strict weapon controls increase costs.
world_traits.mechanical_effect: Any weapon obtained through the Trade Table or purchased outright costs +1 credit

world_traits.name: Import Restrictions
world_traits.description: Trade barriers prevent selling goods on this world.
world_traits.mechanical_effect: You cannot sell any items on this world

world_traits.name: Military Outpost
world_traits.description: Significant military presence affects local conditions.
world_traits.mechanical_effect: Add +2 to Invasion rolls. Add +2 when checking for war progress

world_traits.name: Dangerous
world_traits.description: Hostile creatures or hazardous conditions increase threat levels.
world_traits.mechanical_effect: When rolling on the Roving Threats Encounter Table, increase the number of opponents by +1

world_traits.name: Shipyards
world_traits.description: Major starship construction facilities offer discounted components.
world_traits.mechanical_effect: The cost of all Ship Components is reduced by 2 credits

world_traits.name: Barren
world_traits.description: Lifeless world with minimal vegetation.
world_traits.mechanical_effect: No plant features can be used on the battlefield

world_traits.name: Vendetta System
world_traits.description: Cultural norms encourage blood feuds and long-term grudges.
world_traits.mechanical_effect: Opponents become your Rivals on a roll of 1 or 2

world_traits.name: Free Trade Zone
world_traits.description: Unrestricted commerce allows for better trading opportunities.
world_traits.mechanical_effect: One crew member per campaign turn can roll twice when using the Trade Table, and choose either result

world_traits.name: Corporate State
world_traits.description: Mega-corporations control all aspects of society.
world_traits.mechanical_effect: +2 when rolling to find a Patron. Patrons are always Corporations. Failing a mission means being blacklisted and you cannot get Patrons here again

world_traits.name: Adventurous Population
world_traits.description: Many skilled adventurers seek employment.
world_traits.mechanical_effect: When successfully Recruiting, you may roll up one additional character and then choose who to hire

world_traits.name: Frozen
world_traits.description: Ice-covered terrain creates hazardous movement conditions.
world_traits.mechanical_effect: Any character making a Dash may opt to slide. They move 1D6 inches in a straight line, and must move the full distance. If they collide with anything, they and any character they collide with are knocked 1 inch in a random direction and become Stunned

world_traits.name: Flat
world_traits.description: Featureless plains dominate the landscape.
world_traits.mechanical_effect: Do not place any hills or raised ground on the battlefield

world_traits.name: Fuel Shortage
world_traits.description: Limited fuel supplies increase travel costs.
world_traits.mechanical_effect: The cost to travel from this world is raised by 1D3 credits. You may roll each campaign turn

world_traits.name: Reflective Dust
world_traits.description: Atmospheric particles interfere with energy weapons.
world_traits.mechanical_effect: All Laser, Beam, or Blast weapons are -1 to Hit at ranges exceeding 9 inches

world_traits.name: High Cost
world_traits.description: Expensive living conditions strain crew resources.
world_traits.mechanical_effect: Your crew size counts as being 2 higher for the purpose of Upkeep costs

world_traits.name: Interdiction
world_traits.description: Strict immigration controls limit stay duration.
world_traits.mechanical_effect: You are only approved to stay for 1D3 campaign turns. To extend your stay, you must obtain a license. Roll 2D6, requiring an 8+

world_traits.name: Null Zone
world_traits.description: Spatial anomalies disrupt teleportation technology.
world_traits.mechanical_effect: No teleportation device of any type works

world_traits.name: Crystals
world_traits.description: Crystalline formations dot the landscape.
world_traits.mechanical_effect: Place 2D6 crystals on the battlefield. If you don't have any, use rocks

world_traits.name: Fog
world_traits.description: Dense fog banks reduce long-range visibility.
world_traits.mechanical_effect: All shots beyond 8 inches are -1 to Hit
